title: RBI Prescribes Prudential Norms for SNFAs Acquired by Small Finance Banks
description:
RBI introduces prudential norms for SNFAs acquired by Small Finance Banks, covering acquisition, valuation, disposal, disclosure and reporting from October 1, 2026.
The post RBI Prescribes Prudential Norms for SNFAs Acquired by Small Finance Banks appeared first on TaxGuru.
